name: Torch
description: Torch is one of the Fire core Skylanders in Skylanders: Trap Team.
biography: Torch’s childhood was spent working with her grandfather as a dragon keeper, where she helped tend to a stable of dragons that protected her village. One year, an evil Snow Dragon unleashed a terrible blizzard that trapped her entire homeland inside a massive ice glacier! Torch was the only one to escape. Having always been fearless, she set out at once to rescue the villagers and her dragons from their chilly fate. Armed with her Firespout Flamethrower, she fought hard through the treacherous conditions and bravely defeated the Snow Dragon in an epic battle. After the village was free from its icy doom, Torch returned home to find her grandfather missing. The only token left behind was his lucky flaming horseshoe. Now as a member of the Skylanders, Torch wields her powerful flamethrower as well as her lucky horseshoe in hopes it will one day lead her to the grandfather she had lost.
personality: Torch is pretty fearless. Some might say she is hotheaded. [2]

story.content: Torch was Déjà Vu's opponent in the semi-finals of the Legendary Tournament. After a fierce battle, Déjà Vu won the round and Torch congratulated her before wishing the Magic Skylander luck in her battle against Fist Bump, Trail Blazer, and Fling Kong in the Finals.

content: Money to burn! - when opening a treasure chest
It doesn't get much hotter! - when checking out stats
A hot new look for me! - when wearing a hat
Most of my hats burn off!
A hot sounding name! - when given a nickname

trivia: She is the second Fire Skylander to be female, the first being Smolderdash.

Her Soul Gem upgrade, The Incinerator, has many similarities with the Incinerator from Ratchet & Clank Future: Tools of Destruction, as they're both the maximum upgrade, have dual flame jets coming out of the flamethrower, and have similar names.

Torch is one of the few Skylanders who are currently searching for their loved ones while fighting evil (others being Gill Grunt, Chill, Sprocket, and Roller Brawl).However, Roller Brawl reunited with her brothers in Biting Back by freeing them from Kaos, who ordered trolls to control them by magical puppets.
Torch's voice actor, Salli Saffioti, also voiced Whirlwind and Eye Scream.
Torch claims that the villain Hood Sickle 'gives her the creeps'.[3]
During Gamescom 2014, some of the game's developers mispronounced her name as 'Forge'.
A skin texture map of Torch was leaked in the 1.0 version of Skylanders: Ring of Heroes, but she never appeared in the final game.

trailers.name: Skylanders Trap Team - Torch's Soul Gem Preview (Fire It Up)

basic.name: Blazing Bellows
basic.content: Press and hold Attack 1 to roast enemies with a flamethrower attack.

basic.name: Flaming Horseshoes
basic.content: Press Attack 2 to pitch Flaming Horseshoes that stick to enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Heating Up
basic_upgrades.content: Blazing Bellows attack shoots farther and does extra damage.

basic_upgrades.name: Flaming Hair Whip
basic_upgrades.content: Press Attack 3 to whip flaming hair around and knock back nearby enemies.

basic_upgrades.name: Pyro Pendant
basic_upgrades.content: Enemies with Flaming Horseshoes stuck to them take extra damage from fire.

basic_upgrades.name: Blue Flame
basic_upgrades.content: Hold Attack 1 for a little longer and flames turn blue, doing extra damage and going through enemies.

soulgems.name: The Incinerator
soulgems.content: Press Attack 1 rapidly to create the ultimate flamethrower.

abilities.name: Scorched Earth Policy
abilities.content: Blazing Bellows attack now sets the ground on fire, damaging anyone who touches it.

abilities.name: Hair's Getting Long
abilities.content: Flaming Hair Whip has increased range and does extra damage.

abilities.name: Extra Hot Shoes
abilities.content: Flaming Horseshoes stuck to enemies do additional damage to them over time.

abilities.name: Fireworks Display
abilities.content: Flaming Horseshoes will explode upon wearing off.

abilities.name: Hopping Mad Horseshoes
abilities.content: Use a fire attack on a Flaming Horseshoe and it comes to life, attacking enemies.
